response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." "Zoo" won the Sundance Film Festival's award and was selected as one of the top five American films at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival, while "Divine Trash" is a 1998 documentary film directed by Steve Yeager about John Waters. The success of "Zoo" is indicated by its festival recognition and its inclusion in an international omnibus film, whereas "Divine Trash" is a relatively less recognized film.
